title: CatalogEntry
description: A searchable index record for a governed object, release, or artifact family without redefining the canonical object itself.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

objectRef.description: Reference to the canonical object represented by this catalog entry.

objectType.description: Type name of the canonical object, such as ReleaseManifest or EvidenceBundle.

title.description: Optional title for indexing and presentation.

labels.description: Index labels, tags, or dimensions used for discovery.

evidenceBundleRef.description: Optional EvidenceBundle ref associated with the indexed object.

authorityRef.description: Optional ref to the authority or namespace governing this entry.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this catalog entry was last updated.
